channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Sysinternals Suite 2026.3.5
item.description: Sysinternals Suite is a software monitoring and control system helps to find and fix errors most impressive. The software includes more than seventy utilities aimed at overcoming the problem related to managing files and disks, network problems and security, as well as information about processes and systems. Because of this very rich, the analysis of each ministry will take a significant period of time and therefore, we decided to focus on the most popular. Sysinternals Suite - Set of...

item.title: Download SD Maid 2/SE - System Cleaner 1.6.3-rc0
item.description: SD Maid 2/SE - System Cleaner is a reliable helper for your Android, keeping the device clean & orderly. SD Maid SE has optional features that use the AccessibilityService API to automate tedious actions. Using the AccessibilityService API, SD Maid SE can click buttons for you to perform cross-app operations, for example, clear cache. SD Maid SE does not use the AccessibilityService API to collect information. No one is perfect and neither is Android Apps you deleted will leave...

item.title: Download Equalizer & Bass Booster - XEQ 34.11.0
item.description: This XEQ app is a powerful yet easy-to-use Music Equalizer with Bass Boost, Volume Boost, Auto Volume Boost and 3D Virtualizer effects, which can improve the sound quality of your device. your Android device. This is the only equalizer fx app you will ever need for your smartphone. With this feature, you can not only equalize the bass boost, but also increase the normal sound volume of your Android phone, add virtual 3D effects, save custom presets, automatically recall presets of audio...

item.title: Download MobiOffice: Word, Sheets, PDF 16.2.59203
item.description: OfficeSuite allows you to easily view, edit, and create Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents and perform advanced PDF operations. Our integrated file manager, Chat app with document exchange capabilities, and tons of other handy tools make this the most feature-rich mobile office solution available on Android. Pre-installed by leading manufacturers including Sony, ZTE, Amazon, Sharp, Acer, CAT, Alcatel, Kyocera, Toshiba, etc. Features of OfficeSuite for Android View, create, and...

item.title: Download PictureThis - Plant Identifier 5.21.0
item.description: PictureThis identifies over 1,000,000 plants every day with 98% accuracy - better than most human experts. Get answers to your gardening questions and become a “green thumb” with PictureThis's plant identification capabilities! Identify any plant, flower, herb or tree by photo and get helpful plant care tips. Set timely reminders to water plants on time. Take photos to detect plant diseases and get quick treatment. Chat with experts to receive professional tree planting guidance....

item.title: Download Auto Move To SD Card 3.0.8
item.description: Automatically move from internal memory to external memory (SD card): With this feature, auto-move helps automatically transfer files from internal memory to external memory, avoiding the situation where internal memory is full. This feature supports all types of image, video, audio, document, apk and other file types. Auto transfer will automatically transfer files from selected folders whenever new files are added to selected folders without opening the app. You can select specific...

item.title: Download Calculator Plus with History 8.1.10
item.description: Plus Calculator with History is the perfect calculator for Android. It remembers everything you calculate and allows you to review it at any time, which is perfect for me when shopping, doing homework, balancing my checkbook, or even helping with taxes. And if you need to quit your job and go do something else, I'll have it all ready for you when you get back. You'll never need to re-enter the same calculation twice. Features of Calculator Plus with History Show your calculations in...

item.title: Download PDF Scanner app - TapScanner 3.0.98
item.description: TapScanner is a mobile application that allows you to scan documents with your smartphone camera and convert them into PDF files or image formats. It essentially turns your device into a portable scanner, making capturing and digitizing physical documents convenient on the go. TapScanner Features Scan documents, receipts, QRs and business cards Document Scanner App - Automatic Border Detection Tweak your images with multiple filters to achieve perfection Easily manage your...

item.title: Download Image Size - Photo Resizer 10.8
item.description: This app allows you to resize images to any size you like (with limitations), quickly and easily. It is actually a resizing application. You can specify the output format using one of the following four measurement units: pixels, millimeters, centimeters, inches. To maintain aspect ratio, simply tap the chain icon between the width and height input fields. Image Dimensions gives you the option to save, email, print, or share the final image. Main features: Resize photos or images...

item.title: Download Lightroom Photo & Video Editor 11.2.2
item.description: Adobe Photoshop Lightroom is a powerful, free camera app and photo editor that empowers your photography, helping you capture and edit stunning images. Easy image editing tools like sliders and filters simplify photo editing. Edit full-resolution photos, apply photo filters, or start editing photos anytime, anywhere. It offers a variety of editing tools, including basic adjustments like cropping, rotation, and brightness control as well as advanced features like color grading, selective...

item.title: Download Carly - OBD2 car scanner 49.77
item.description: Carly is a mobile OBD2 (On-Board Diagnostics) car scanner application that allows users to diagnose, monitor and repair their vehicles. The application works by connecting to the vehicle's OBD2 port, usually located under the dashboard, and collecting data from the vehicle's computer system. The adapter and app work with Audi, BMW, Lexus, Mercedes, Mini, Porsche, Renault, Seat, Skoda, Toyota, VW and most car brands in the world with OBD2 port. Carly - OBD2 car scanner Features Check...

item.title: Download YoWindow Weather - Unlimited 2.57.2
item.description: YoWindow is a unique new weather app. The magic of YoWindow is a living landscape that reflects your real-life weather. For example, if it rains - it will rain in YoWindow. Sunset and sunrise in YoWindow take place at the same time as in real life. But the cool thing is you can roll time forward. Just swipe the screen and you'll see how the weather changes throughout the day. YoWindow Weather Features - Unlimited All the weather at your fingertips. You see the current weather,...

item.title: Download Passwords & Passkeys－Safe 27.3.14
item.description: Protect your data with a unique and secure password! Forget the headache of remembering PINs and passwords! START USING PASSWORD MANAGER TODAY! SafeInCloud is a complete password management solution: Free desktop app + Mobile app for phones and tablets. Features of Password Manager SafeInCloud Pro Material Design Dark theme Strong encryption (AES) Cloud synchronization (Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive) Finger Scan and Multi-Window (Samsung devices) Analyze password...

item.title: Download Weather & Radar USA - Pro 2026.5
item.description: Weather & Radar USA is a mobile application that provides users with real-time weather information and forecasts for locations in the United States. The app includes many features such as current weather conditions, hourly and daily forecasts, radar and satellite images, and severe weather alerts. It also includes many customizable settings, such as the ability to set up multiple locations and receive notifications about specific weather conditions. Features of Weather & Radar...

item.title: Download WiFi Mouse Pro 6.0.0
item.description: Convert your phone into a wireless mouse, keyboard and trackpad for your computer, it allows you to control your PC/Mac/Linux easily via local network connection. Media Controller, Presentation Controller and Remote File Explorer are all included in this controller app. Now you can relax on the sofa and control movies or games in the comfort of your own home, replacing your broken mouse and keyboard with this app. Features of WiFi Mouse Pro Fully simulated mouse Built-in support...

item.title: Download Lucky Patcher 12.0.8
item.description: Lucky Patcher is a free Android app that can modify many apps and games, Block ads, remove unwanted system apps, backup apps before and after modification, Move apps apps to SD card, remove license verification from paid apps and games, etc. Lucky Patcher features and details: Remove or block ads on Android apps and games. You can easily block ads with Lucky Patcher. Block in-app purchase verification with the app. You can use premium apps and games for free by removing in-app...

item.title: Download Speedtest by Ookla 6.6.5
item.description: Speedtest by Ookla is a popular online service that allows users to measure the speed of their internet connection. The service works by sending small amounts of data to a user's device and measuring the time it takes for that data to return to the server. Based on this measurement, the service provides reports on the user's download and upload speeds as well as connection latency. Features of Ookla Speedtest Explore your downloads, uploads, and pings The only Internet connection...

item.title: Download Currency Converter Plus 3.1.11
item.description: Advanced currency converter - With multiple currency fields, historical rate charts, and a built-in calculator for convenience, compare prices wherever you travel abroad to ensure Make sure you get the best deal at today's price. All conversions use live exchange rates from AccuRate™, providing the most accurate rates available in the world. Plus, it still works offline for moves when exchange rate data isn't available. This app even supports Bitcoin! Features of Currency Converter...

item.title: Download Your Calendar Widget 1.70.2
item.description: Your Calendar Widget is an app that provides a customizable calendar widget for Android devices. The app allows users to view their upcoming events and appointments directly from their device's home screen. It shows your upcoming events. You can easily configure and adjust the widget according to your needs. Each widget has its own configuration. This allows you to have several widgets with different display and calendar settings. Features of Your Calendar Widget Widgets can be used...

item.title: Download WiFi Analyzer Pro 7.1
item.description: WiFi Analyzer Pro is a mobile application that provides users with advanced tools to analyze and optimize their Wi-Fi network. It allows users to monitor Wi-Fi signal strength and quality, view graphical charts of their network's channel usage, and select the optimal channel for their network to minimize interference from other neighboring networks. In addition, WiFi Analyze Pro can help users diagnose connection issues, such as slow speeds or lost connections, by displaying signal...

item.title: Download Phone Doctor Pro 2.1.4
item.description: Phone Doctor Pro is an unparalleled Android application meticulously designed to provide comprehensive insights into your mobile device. With a modern user interface and interactive features, Phone Doctor Plus provides a comprehensive range of data, from CPU performance, hardware information to network capabilities and more. Explore the intricate aspects of your device: Phone Doctor Plus Dashboard: Gain real-time knowledge of RAM, internal and external storage, battery health...

item.title: Download SeriesGuide 2026.1.2
item.description: With SeriesGuide, you can find shows and movies to watch, keep track of your watched episodes and movies, get notifications about upcoming episodes, and back up and sync across your devices. suffered. Explore. Find shows with new, popular, or similar episodes to the ones you're watching. Discover movies currently in theaters, released digitally or on disc. Backup and synchronization. Sign in to SeriesGuide Cloud to back up and sync your shows, lists, and movies. Integration with...

item.title: Download Magnifying Glass 4.1.9
item.description: Magnifier is a simple app for Android devices used to magnify the appearance of objects or text that are small and difficult to see with the naked eye. Features of Magnifier for Android Zoom: from 1x to 10x. Flashlight: Use a flashlight in dark places or at night. Freeze: After freezing, you can view a more detailed enlarged image. Take a photo: Save an enlarged photo on your phone. Completely free.

item.title: Download Dumbbell & Barbell Workouts 4.15
item.description: Build muscle and increase strength through weight lifting exercises with barbells and dumbbells. Download the app and get everything you need: Pre-set workout plans: 5x5 Full body Fat Destroyer German Volume Training Illustrated exercises for each muscle group Voice guidance Detailed history Custom workouts Custom workouts Tip: Choose a weight that you feel comfortable with. Only increase the weight when you feel like you're losing interest in a set.
